title: Jason Goes to Hell: The Final Friday
review: Unlike some of them, this is a real film. There are funny, actual on-screen mutilations, and not just people falling over when Jason thumps them. There is a plot with characters who learn information that influences their actions. Drama ensues when they interact with each other. There are creative ideas and it's a better looking film than the rest of the series so far. However, to my colossal disappointment, not a single moment of this film actually takes place in hell, and it's not even the final entry in the franchise. It turns out Jason was a dinosaur this whole time!
